name: Betting Market Boundary Puncture

VINIT.justification: uninitialized state before any odds, liquidity, or market structure exist

TANCH.justification: closed boundary that contains all market operations, defines risk limits, and seals the system

AFWD.justification: directed transformation toward target valuation as new information enters the market

AREV.justification: reverse descent transformation as capital retreats from perceived risk toward equilibrium

CLINK.justification: sequential chaining of buy and sell orders into executable trades

IMSCRIB.justification: self-reference where the system recognizes its own current state, closing the price discovery loop

FSPLIT.justification: co-multiplication that splits unified market expectation into two distinct valuation paths: bull and bear

FFUSE.justification: multiplication that reconstitutes the bull and bear paths back into a single settled market state

EVALT.justification: affirmative branch where the bull path validates and resolves positively

EVALF.justification: negative branch where the bear path validates and resolves negatively

ENGAGR.justification: paradice where both winning and losing valuations are held simultaneously as the boundary punctures into dialetheia

IFIX.justification: permanent irreversible record that fixes the final settled state into the immutable transaction log

phase_3.void_description: pre-market silence — no odds, no liquidity, pure potential before any structural coupling
phase_3.true_description: price discovery complete — affirmative resolution, liquidity flows forward, T-state stabilized
phase_3.false_description: price collapse — negative resolution, liquidity halts, F-state stabilized
phase_3.both_description: boundary puncture — odds hold both values simultaneously, market enters dialetheia (B-state) without collapse

steps.domain_action: pre-market void — initializes the betting market from pure potential before any odds or liquidity exist
exchange risk engine — establishes the closed boundary that contains all market operations and risk limits
price momentum — drives forward morphism toward target valuation as new information enters
liquidity drain — reverses flow as capital retreats from perceived risk, descending toward equilibrium
order book matching — sequentially chains buy and sell orders into executable trades
market self-valuation — the system recognizes its own current state, closing the loop on price discovery
odds bifurcation — splits the unified market expectation into two distinct valuation paths: bull and bear
edge invariant propagation — advances structural correlation along the T-arm without temporal drift
winning ticket — anchors the T-arm with affirmative resolution as the bull path validates
signal decay — descends the F-arm as contradictory data dilutes the bear path
losing ticket — anchors the F-arm with negative resolution as the bear path validates
settlement reconciliation — fuses the bull and bear paths back into a single settled market state
arbitrage paradox — holds both winning and losing valuations simultaneously as the boundary punctures into dialetheia
structural manifold read — chains the B-state absorption into the next valuation cycle
boundary puncture recognition — self-references the dialetheic state to confirm structural completeness
ledger entry — permanently fixes the final settled state into the immutable transaction record

phase_6.delta_s_verdict: ΔS ≈ 0 — the split/fuse cycle preserves market expectation exactly; structural invariants replace temporal drift, making the atemporal inference entropy-conservative

lean_scaffold:

      -- F-branch (1 nodes)

    -- reconnect at FFUSE [11]: μ closes the Frobenius pair

-- truth arm

  (betting_market_boundary_puncture_protocol).restrictToEVALT

-- false arm
